# PERF-78 positive: db.Raw with WHERE/ORDER BY and no index hint comment
lang: go
file: PERF-078-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import "gorm.io/gorm"

type User struct {
	gorm.Model
	Email string
}

func FindByEmail(db *gorm.DB, email string) (User, error) {
	var u User
	err := db.Raw("SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = ? ORDER BY created_at DESC", email).Scan(&u).Error
	return u, err
}
